info.title: AutoSend API
info.description: AutoSend REST API for managing authenticated senders

get.description: Retrieves all authenticated senders for the project.

post.description: Creates a new authenticated sender. The sender's email domain must match a verified domain on the project.

get.description: Retrieves a single authenticated sender by its ID.

delete.description: Deletes an authenticated sender. The sender cannot be deleted if it is in use by active campaigns or workflow automations.
